AICARDMOD-PIOUS_DEFEND_CARD.title: Pious Defend
AICARDMOD-PIOUS_DEFEND_CARD.description:
Gain {Block} Block.
If Piety >= 2, gain {BonusBlock} more Block.
AICARDMOD-PIOUS_DEFEND_CARD.upgraded_des:
Gain {Block} Block.
If Piety >= 2, gain {BonusBlock} more Block.
AICARDMOD-ORACLE_TABLET_RELIC.title: Oracle Tablet
AICARDMOD-ORACLE_TABLET_RELIC.descriptio: When using Oracle at 0 Piety, the oracle responds as DISPLEASED instead of ANGERED.
AICARDMOD-PRAY_CARD.title: Prayer
AICARDMOD-DEVOTION_CARD.title: Devotion
AICARDMOD-DEVOTION_CARD.description: Gain 1 Piety at the start of each turn.
AICARDMOD-DEVOTION_CARD.upgraded_descrip: Gain 2 Piety at the start of each turn.
AICARDMOD-AI_CARD.title: AI Oracle
AICARDMOD-AI_CARD.description: Name your desire. The AI grants exactly what you ask — if it is too powerful, a price must be paid.
AICARDMOD-AI_CARD.upgraded_description: Name your desire. The AI grants exactly what you ask — if it is too powerful, a price must be paid.
AICARDMOD-UI_DIALOG.title: Oracle  —  Name Your Desire
AICARDMOD-UI_DIALOG.instructions:
What effect do you want? (e.g. "80 block", "draw 3 cards", "2 strength")
If the request is too powerful, the AI will add a penalty to balance it.

AICARDMOD-SACRED_FLAME_CARD.description: Deal {Damage} damage. If Piety >= 3, deal {BonusDamage} more damage.
AICARDMOD-SACRED_FLAME_CARD.upgraded_des: Deal {Damage} damage. If Piety >= 3, deal {BonusDamage} more damage.
AICARDMOD-JUDGMENT_CARD.title: Judgment
